dependencies: Third-party service providers for information technology and communications systems
Third-party data center hosting facilities and cloud computing platform providers
Subcontracted vendor work for facilities management and project management services
risks: Failure by third parties to comply with service level agreements or regulatory requirements
Disruptions to information technology systems and network infrastructure
Reliance on third-party vendors for critical services
Infrastructure disruptions from climate change, geopolitical tensions, or other events

regulatory_risks: Federal, state and local laws and regulations specific to real estate services (brokerage, property management, valuation)
Real estate licensing requirements in U.S. states and non-U.S. jurisdictions
SEC, FINRA, and state securities regulators oversight for CBRE Capital Markets and CBRE Investment Management
Fair Labor Standards Act and occupational health and safety regulations
U.S. Foreign Corrupt Practices Act (FCPA) and U.K. Bribery Act compliance
Anti-bribery, anti-money laundering and corruption laws
Data privacy and protection regulations (GDPR, California Consumer Privacy Act, state privacy laws)
Environmental laws and regulations governing hazardous substances and greenhouse gas emissions
U.K. Building Safety Act of 2022 and fire safety remediation requirements
OECD Pillar Two Model Rules establishing minimum global corporate tax rate of 15%
Changes in tax laws or regulations in multiple jurisdictions
Sustainability and ESG disclosure requirements (EU Corporate Sustainability Reporting Directive, TCFD-aligned requirements)
Foreign ownership restrictions in certain countries (particularly Asia Pacific and Middle East)
Changes in laws governing foreign trade, investment, or use of foreign workers

sanction_risks: Compliance with U.S. and other countries' trade sanctions
Impact of government sanctions on business operations
Risks from geopolitical conflicts (Russia-Ukraine, Middle East tensions)
Potential cyberattacks on critical infrastructure during geopolitical conflicts
Currency restrictions and transfer pricing rules in foreign jurisdictions
